name: Split Pea Soup (Brown)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep split peas in hot water for one hour, then drain.
2. In a soup pot, fry onion and garlic for 4 minutes.
3. Add the remaining vegetables, peas, caraway seed, bay leaf, and mace.
4. Cook for 5 to 6 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add most of the stock. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 40 minutes.
6. Remove the bay leaf and allow to cool slightly.
7. Blend until smooth. Reheat before serving, but do not boil.
